label: 2026-04-16-old-opening
description: April 15 memorized opening ported to April 16: distributed three-plant deploy with no attacker screen in the lane-2 sniper's line of fire. Expected to FAIL because (a) the lane-2 Sunroot has no screen so the first sniper shot kills it before the first sap payoff, and (b) walkers in lanes outside the deployed positions breach the 1-HP garden in Wave 1.

placements.note: front-of-wall Thorn in lane 1 (April 15 walker habit)
back-column Sunroot in lane 2 — the memorized April 15 bank slot; unscreened against the lane-2 sniper
mid-board Bramble in lane 3 (April 15 piercing habit)
